name: Inferno Volcano Pizza
description: A fiery combination of spicy chicken,  red onions, and molten mozzarella on a smoky tomato base for spice lovers.

name: Truffle Royale Pizza
description: Creamy white sauce, wild mushrooms, truffle oil.

name: Garden Delight Pizza
description: Loaded with fresh bell peppers, olives, sweet corn, onions, tomatoes, and mozzarella cheese.

name: BBQ Smokehouse Pizza
description: Smoky BBQ chicken, caramelized onions, roasted peppers, and cheddar cheese on a crispy crust.

name: Cheese Avalanche Pizza
description: Five premium cheeses blended together with garlic butter and Italian herbs for ultimate cheesiness.

name: Mediterranean Magic Pizza
description: Feta cheese, black olives, cherry tomatoes, spinach, and oregano on a light tomato base.

name: Spicy Mexican Fiesta Pizza
description: Mexican beans, jalapeños, corn, onions, spicy salsa, and mozzarella topped with tortilla crunch.

name: Hawaiian Paradise Pizza
description: Juicy pineapple chunks paired with smoked chicken and melted mozzarella for a sweet and savory bite.

name: Pepperoni Supreme Pizza
description: Classic pepperoni layered over rich tomato sauce with extra mozzarella and Italian seasoning.

name: Paneer Tikka Delight Pizza
description: Marinated paneer tikka, onions, capsicum, and mint mayo over a spicy Indian-style pizza base.

name: Garlic Lovers Pizza
description: Roasted garlic, garlic butter, mozzarella, parmesan, and herbs baked on a golden crust.

name: Mushroom Melt Pizza
description: Fresh mushrooms, creamy garlic sauce, mozzarella, and parmesan finished with parsley.

name: Farm Fresh Pizza
description: A wholesome mix of mushrooms, onions, tomatoes, capsicum, and sweet corn with mozzarella.

name: Crispy Chicken Crunch Pizza
description: Crispy chicken strips, spicy mayo, onions, and mozzarella topped with crunchy herbs.

name: Pesto Garden Pizza
description: Fresh basil pesto, mozzarella, cherry tomatoes, olives, and parmesan for a vibrant Italian flavor.

name: Four Seasons Pizza
description: Four delicious sections featuring mushrooms, olives, chicken, and fresh vegetables in one pizza.

name: Buffalo Chicken Pizza
description: Tender buffalo chicken, ranch drizzle, onions, mozzarella, and a spicy buffalo sauce finish.

name: Sweet Chili Crunch Pizza
description: Sweet chili sauce, crispy vegetables, mozzarella, and crunchy onions for a perfect balance of sweet and spicy.

name: Ocean Breeze Pizza
description: A premium seafood pizza with shrimp, calamari, mozzarella, garlic butter, and fresh herbs.

name: Midnight Supreme Pizza
description: A signature pizza loaded with premium toppings, double cheese, black olives, mushrooms, and herbs.
